productDisplayName: Lotto Women Sofia Pink Black Floater
description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these Sofia floaters from lotto. This pair can be teamed with skirts and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic straps on the forefoot and ankles for comfort and protection Forefoot and ankle straps joined by a diagonal synthetic strap for perfect Fit Adjustable forefoot strap for customised fit Ankle strap with clasp for convenience Ankle straps and forefoot straps with lining for all-day comfort Velcro strap enclosures on the forefoot and on the ankle strap to customise fit Midsole Grooved footbed for an all day massage TPR outsole for perfect wear during monsoons Outsole Multi-directional patterns on the outsole for great grip Flex grooves along the central length of the outsole for flexible movement of the feet shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
